ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coach_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding activity session */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each coach feedback entry
ID of the user receiving the feedback
ID of the corresponding activity session
Timestamp when the feedback was created
ID of the user who earned the badge
Timestamp when the badge was earned
